description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean, straight lines and a predominantly rectangular form. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with subtle blue accents along the roofline and trim. Large, vertical windows are arranged in a row on one side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roof is flat and extends slightly beyond the main structure, creating a sleek overhang. The entryway is recessed and partially sheltered, with a simple, unadorned door and no visible steps or porch. The overall appearance is functional and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric simplicity.
description: A modern, minimalist house with a flat roof, light gray and white exterior, and large vertical windows. The design is sleek, geometric, and functional.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with three large vertical windows and the main entryway, highlighting the flat roof and overhanging structure.
description_view_1: From this angle, the solid side wall and the full length of the flat roof are visible, with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: This view reveals the opposite side of the house, featuring a long, uninterrupted wall and a partial view of the recessed entryway.
description_view_3: Looking at the house from the end, the recessed entryway and the depth of the overhanging roof are prominent, with the window arrangement partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed, simple entryway with no visible steps or porch, minimalistic and unadorned
